decisionLog.question: Primary purpose of first version
decisionLog.decision: A: private personal joy / visual record of nomadic life

decisionLog.question: First version navigation placement
decisionLog.decision: Quiet Dashboard or Overview entry; do not add a fifth bottom navigation item.

decisionLog.question: First version historical data entry
decisionLog.decision: Manual past-flight entry first. CSV import and AI batch import are later extensions.
